title: Career Transition Partnership ex-service personnel employment outcomes statistics: index
body: "This statistical bulletin provides summary statistics on employment outcomes, 6 months after leaving service, for UK regular and Gurkha service personnel who left the UK Armed Forces and accessed employment support provided by the Career Transition Partnership (CTP).  The CTP supports service leavers in their transition from military to civilian life through a range of career and employment support services including workshops, one to one guidance and job finding support. There are 3 main employment outcomes: employed, unemployed and economically inactive (not in employment, but not actively looking for work).  Upcoming release dates for this publication are available here.   In the upcoming Career Transition Partnership ex-service personnel employment outcomes 2023/24 data, the reason for not using a billable CTP service will not be presented in Table 1. This is due to a data quality issue that occurred during a data transfer to a new system.  The table will be reviewed ahead of the Career Transition Partnership statistic 2024/25.   Related information   Statistics at MOD MOD statistics pre-release access list MOD National and Official Statistics by topic   "

taxons.title: Support services for military and defence personnel and their families
